name: Your Dumb Girlfriend Got Herself Into Trouble
description:
As you emerge from the changing cabin near the beach, you spot your naive girlfriend Vivian near the secluded cabins, surrounded by two lecherous men. They leer at her bikini-clad curves, inviting the trusting beauty to their "private party".

Will you intervene and tell them to back off... or let sweet, silly Vivian handle it herself, curious to see where her innocence leads? Perhaps even join them for the party?

The choice is yours.

NSFW-Link:

https://sta.sh/0ec7au6ep78
creator: Ergoprime
